title: Brand configuration
description: Single source of truth for brand identity. Edit brand.json; the app adapters (brand.ts / brand-theme.ts / oauth.ts), build scripts, app.config.js and the Cloudflare Workers read it. Logo SVGs (assets/brand/) and the OAuth keypair (oauth.public-jwks.json) live elsewhere.

name.description: Display name, used in titles and in-app brand text.

hosts.description: First-party web hostnames (bare host, no scheme). hosts[0] is primary (og:url base, Worker origin). Links to these render as rich embeds.

socialHandle.description: X/Twitter @handle for twitter:site. Empty omits the tag.

colors.description: Palette. neutral = the contrast_ ramp; accents = swappable primary_ families; defaultAccent = the shipped family.

neutralSubduedOverrides.description: Per-key overrides for the dim theme's deep end (softer than pure black).

accents.description: Selectable accent families (keys are the accent ids used by defaultAccent and the in-app picker).

defaultAccent.description: Which accents key this build ships and uses as the per-user default. Must be a key in accents.

defaultBaseUrl.description: App origin; client_id is <defaultBaseUrl>/oauth-client-metadata.json. Override per build with EXPO_PUBLIC_OAUTH_BASE_URL.

scope.description: Scope NEW logins request. Keep transitional-only (atproto + transition:*) so every PDS accepts it.

declaredScope.description: Superset advertised in client metadata; must cover step-ups (identity:handle) and any scope older cached bundles still request.

links.description: Brand-owned web pages linked from the UI (legal/support/download). Point these at your own pages.

services.description: atproto network endpoints. Default to the public Bluesky network; override only what you self-host.

verification.description: Verification trust root: the app honors verifications from members + creators of these lists.

ageAssurance.description: Age-assurance backend defaults. Overridable at build with EXPO_PUBLIC_AGE_SERVICE_URL / _DID.

contrastRamp.description: Neutral background->text ramp (contrast_0 = white .. contrast_1000 = black).

primaryRamp.description: An accent family: primary_25 (lightest) .. primary_975 (darkest); primary_500 is the core interactive tone.
